label: Content
description: Calm, settled, happy to be put down.

label: Quiet alert
description: Awake, looking around, taking things in.

label: Fussy
description: Squirming or whimpering; often an early hunger or tired cue.

label: Crying
description: Actively crying; needs soothing, feeding, or a diaper change.

label: Inconsolable
description: Hard to settle for a long stretch; note if it is unusual for baby.
